_publications._publicationTitle: Phase I trial and pharmacokinetic study of sorafenib in children with neurofibromatosis type I and plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Parent ratings indicated that three of these four patients had declines of 9, 17, and 27 points in the PedsQL Total scale score indicating worse QOL.
details: Parent ratings showed declines of 9, 17, and 27 points in PedsQL Total scale score indicating worse quality of life in 3 of 4 patients evaluated
